capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an upgrade and patch management service for applications, devices, and systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise upgrade and patch management service exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Service for applications, devices, and systems

questions.prompt: Does the upgrade and patch management service extend to the entire enterprise or a specific scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the service scope is enterprise-wide or limited

questions.prompt: Is the upgrade and patch management service reviewed at least quarterly to assess efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the service is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy

capability_questions.capability_name: Unified patch management process (enterprise and supply chain)

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an asset-neutral upgrade and patch management process for enterprise-owned assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an asset-neutral enterprise patch process exists

questions.prompt: Does the patch management process apply enterprise-wide or for a specific set of assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the process scope is enterprise-wide or limited

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized third-party and supply chain upgrade and patch management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether third-party and supply chain patching is formalized
questions.evaluation_focus: Third-party and supply chain patch process

questions.prompt: Does the third-party patch process apply to all vendors and supply chain partners or a defined subset?
questions.intent: Evaluate the scope of third-party patch coverage
questions.evaluation_focus: Scope of third parties and vendors

questions.prompt: Is the upgrade and patch management process automated across enterprise and third-party assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether patch processes are automated

questions.prompt: Is the unified patch management process reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the patch process is reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Has the enterprise formalized and documented KPIs and KRIs for the upgrade and patch management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether patch management KPIs and KRIs are documented

questions.prompt: Are upgrade KPIs and KRIs specific to target systems or common across the entire enterprise scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs are system-specific or enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Are upgrade and patch KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs are reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Do KPIs or KRIs track mean time to remediate (MTTR), patch compliance rate, or patch velocity across asset classes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether modern patch velocity and remediation metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: Mean time to remediate and patch velocity metrics

questions.prompt: Does the organization measure adherence to critical vulnerability remediation SLAs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether critical vulnerability SLA adherence is measured

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have centralized orchestration for network device upgrades and patches (such as via an SDN controller or network management platform)?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network upgrade orchestration exists

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have centralized orchestration for endpoint device upgrades and patches?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether endpoint upgrade orchestration exists

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have centralized orchestration for application and system upgrades and patches?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application upgrade orchestration exists

questions.prompt: Does the upgrade system automate patching across network, endpoint, and application assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether patch automation is implemented across asset classes

questions.prompt: Are upgrade-specific configurations on patch management systems reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether patch system configurations are reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Can upgrade and patch management systems integrate with compliance and vulnerability management for end-to-end remediation?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether patch systems integrate with compliance and vulnerability management
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with compliance and vulnerability management

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have upgrade and patch management policies for devices, network equipment, and applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether patch policies exist across asset classes

questions.prompt: Do endpoint and device patch policies apply enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether device patch policies are enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Do network device patch policies apply enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network patch policies are enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Do application and system patch policies apply enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application patch policies are enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Are patch management policies reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether patch policies are reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a dedicated team that handles device upgrades across all device assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a dedicated device upgrade team covers all assets

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a dedicated team that handles network upgrades across all network assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a dedicated network upgrade team covers all assets

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a dedicated team that handles application upgrades across all application assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a dedicated application upgrade team covers all assets

capability_questions.capability_name: Upgrade and patch management service logging

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for logging upgrade and patch information to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether patch logging to the SOC is formally documented

questions.prompt: Is logging of upgrades and patches made securely to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether patch logs are transferred securely to the SOC

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to the upgrade and patching process captured and transferred to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether dynamic patch process changes are logged to the SOC

questions.prompt: Does the organization use AI or machine learning to assist vulnerability triage for patch prioritization?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI assists vulnerability triage for patching

questions.prompt: Is patch prioritization automated based on risk scoring, exploitability, or threat intelligence context?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether risk-based patch prioritization is automated

questions.prompt: Does remediation sequencing account for asset criticality, exposure, and active threat campaigns?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether remediation sequencing uses threat context
questions.evaluation_focus: Remediation sequencing informed by threat context
